concerns.detail: Full name of student (Yufei Ding) identified alongside specific accusations of cheating and misconduct; PhD students are private individuals in this context

concerns.detail: Gendered character attack using 'academic Daji' (妲己), a slur implying sexual misconduct or use of sexual appeal for academic gain without evidence
Unsupported character judgment accusing a commenter of being the 'involved female student' with an agenda to clear her name
concerns.excerpt: 感觉像涉事女学生在这里使劲找人洗
